name: BOEING CO
summary: Boeing is a major aerospace firm operating in three segments: Commercial Airplanes (BCA), Defense, Space & Security (BDS), and Global Services (BGS). BCA produces commercial jet aircraft including the 737, 767, 777, 787, and 777X. BDS develops military aircraft, weapons systems, satellites, and missile defense. BGS provides maintenance, spare parts, training, logistics, and digital solutions to commercial and defense customers worldwide.

products.description: Narrow-body commercial jet aircraft in production for airline industry worldwide.
Wide-body commercial jet aircraft in production for passenger and cargo use.
Wide-body commercial jet aircraft in production for global airline industry.
Wide-body commercial jet aircraft in production for global airline industry.
